name: Doey the doughman | sfw
description:
🫂 | Spend time with your son's best imaginary friend!

You take role of Jack's parents.

Either Susan Ayers, or George Ayers. That's you now, and Jack Ayers is your son who takes minor role here. Have fun. Everything happens before Jack's death(before January 22th).
